description_fr: Tupac, Biggie, Eminem, Jay-Z, Drake, Kendrick. Histoire et culture du hip-hop.
description_en: Tupac, Biggie, Eminem, Jay-Z, Drake, Kendrick. History and culture of hip-hop.

questions.question_fr: Dans quel quartier de New York est né le hip-hop ?
questions.question_en: In which New York neighborhood was hip-hop born?
questions.explanation_fr: Le hip-hop est né dans le Bronx en 1973 grâce à DJ Kool Herc.
questions.explanation_en: Hip-hop was born in the Bronx in 1973 thanks to DJ Kool Herc.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le vrai nom d'Eminem ?
questions.explanation_fr: Marshall Bruce Mathers III, né en 1972 à Saint Joseph, Missouri.
questions.explanation_en: Marshall Bruce Mathers III, born 1972 in Saint Joseph, Missouri.

questions.question_fr: Tupac et The Notorious B.I.G. ont tous deux été assassinés.
questions.question_en: Both Tupac and The Notorious B.I.G. were assassinated.
questions.explanation_fr: Tupac (1996) et Biggie (1997) ont été abattus en plein conflit East Coast vs West Coast.
questions.explanation_en: Tupac (1996) and Biggie (1997) were shot during the East Coast vs West Coast feud.

questions.question_fr: Qui est le mari de Beyoncé, lui-même rappeur ?
questions.question_en: Who is Beyoncé's husband, also a rapper?
questions.explanation_fr: Shawn Carter (Jay-Z) a épousé Beyoncé en 2008.

questions.question_fr: Qui a remporté le Pulitzer en 2018 pour son album 'DAMN.' ?
questions.question_en: Who won the 2018 Pulitzer Prize for the album 'DAMN.'?
questions.explanation_fr: Kendrick Lamar est le 1er rappeur à remporter le Pulitzer Music Prize.
questions.explanation_en: Kendrick Lamar is the 1st rapper to win the Pulitzer Music Prize.

questions.question_fr: Le rappeur canadien aux multiples #1 dans les charts s'appelle ___.
questions.question_en: The Canadian rapper with multiple #1 hits is named ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Aubrey Drake Graham, ancien acteur dans Degrassi, originaire de Toronto.
questions.explanation_en: Aubrey Drake Graham, former actor in Degrassi, from Toronto.

questions.question_fr: De quel film vient la chanson 'Lose Yourself' d'Eminem ?
questions.question_en: Which film features Eminem's song 'Lose Yourself'?
questions.explanation_fr: 8 Mile (2002), Oscar de la meilleure chanson originale en 2003.
questions.explanation_en: 8 Mile (2002), Best Original Song Oscar in 2003.

questions.question_fr: Snoop Dogg s'appelle Calvin Broadus en réalité.
questions.question_en: Snoop Dogg's real name is Calvin Broadus.
questions.explanation_fr: Calvin Cordozar Broadus Jr., né en 1971 à Long Beach, Californie.
questions.explanation_en: Calvin Cordozar Broadus Jr., born 1971 in Long Beach, California.

questions.question_fr: Quel groupe de Compton a sorti l'album 'Straight Outta Compton' ?
questions.question_en: Which Compton group released 'Straight Outta Compton'?
questions.explanation_fr: N.W.A. avec Ice Cube, Dr. Dre, Eazy-E. Album sorti en 1988.
questions.explanation_en: N.W.A. with Ice Cube, Dr. Dre, Eazy-E. Album released in 1988.

questions.question_fr: Quel rappeur a fondé le label Death Row Records ?
questions.question_en: Which rapper founded Death Row Records?
questions.explanation_fr: Suge Knight a fondé Death Row Records en 1991 avec Dr. Dre.
questions.explanation_en: Suge Knight founded Death Row Records in 1991 with Dr. Dre.

questions.question_fr: Le célèbre groupe de Staten Island s'appelle ___-Tang Clan.
questions.question_en: The famous Staten Island group is called ___-Tang Clan.
questions.explanation_fr: Wu-Tang Clan formé en 1992 à Staten Island, NYC. RZA, GZA, ODB, Method Man, etc.
questions.explanation_en: Wu-Tang Clan formed in 1992 in Staten Island, NYC. RZA, GZA, ODB, Method Man, etc.

questions.question_en: Kanye West rebranded himself as 'Ye' in 2021.
questions.explanation_fr: Kanye West a légalement changé de nom pour 'Ye' en octobre 2021.
questions.explanation_en: Kanye West legally changed his name to 'Ye' in October 2021.

questions.explanation_fr: Nicki Minaj, ce hit samplait 'Baby Got Back' de Sir Mix-a-Lot.
questions.explanation_en: Nicki Minaj, the hit sampled Sir Mix-a-Lot's 'Baby Got Back'.

questions.question_fr: Combien de fois Drake a-t-il été #1 en simultané dans le Hot 100 (2022) ?
questions.question_en: How many simultaneous Hot 100 entries did Drake have at peak (2022)?
questions.explanation_fr: Drake a placé 27 titres dans le Hot 100 en juillet 2022, record historique.
questions.explanation_en: Drake placed 27 songs on the Hot 100 in July 2022, a historic record.

questions.question_fr: Le rappeur français le plus streamé en 2023 s'appelle ___ Maluku.
questions.question_en: The most-streamed French rapper in 2023 is called ___ Maluku.
questions.explanation_fr: Ninho (William Nzobazola), originaire de Yerres en France, leader des streams.
questions.explanation_en: Ninho (William Nzobazola), from Yerres, France, top streaming rapper.
